'''fayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:abhorrently|abhorrently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:abhorrently|abhorrently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fayate|fayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fayatesher|fayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayatesherĂ«m|fayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fayatero|fayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fayateshĂ«|fayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayateshĂ«m|fayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifayatero|gokifayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifayateshĂ«|gokifayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayateshĂ«m|gokifayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofayankerom|gofayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofayankeshĂ«|gofayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofayankeshĂ«m|gofayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofayankeya|gofayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fayaterom|fayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayatemu|fayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fayateya|fayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifayaterom|gokifayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayatemu|gokifayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifayateya|gokifayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fayayate|fayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fayayatesher|fayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayayatesherĂ«m|fayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fayayatero|fayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fayayateshĂ«|fayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayayateshĂ«m|fayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifayayatero|gokifayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifayayateshĂ«|gokifayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayayateshĂ«m|gokifayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofayayankerom|gofayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofayayankeshĂ«|gofayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofayayankeshĂ«m|gofayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofayayankeya|gofayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fayayaterom|fayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayayatemu|fayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fayayateya|fayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifayayaterom|gokifayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayayatemu|gokifayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifayayateya|gokifayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠte|fĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠtesher|fĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠtero|fĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠyĂŠtero|gokifĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠterom|fĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠtemu|fĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠteya|fĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠyĂŠterom|gokifĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠyĂŠteya|gokifĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafyafte|fafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafyaftesher|fafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafyaftesherĂ«m|fafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafyaftero|fafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafyafteshĂ«|fafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafyafteshĂ«m|fafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafyaftero|gokifafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafyafteshĂ«|gokifafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafyafteshĂ«m|gokifafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafyafnkerom|gofafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafyafnkeshĂ«|gofafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafyafnkeshĂ«m|gofafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafyafnkeya|gofafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafyafterom|fafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafyaftemu|fafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafyafteya|fafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafyafterom|gokifafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafyaftemu|gokifafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafyafteya|gokifafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
